  have hO1_ne_O2 : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by
    intro h
    have h_circ : (⟨_, affineIndependent_ADC⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumcenter = (⟨_, affineIndependent_EXD⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumcenter := by rwa [← O₁_eq_circumcenter_ADC, ← O₂_eq_circumcenter_EXD]
    sorry
  refine ⟨hE_ne_F, hO1_ne_O2, ?_⟩
  let L1 := line[ℝ, B, C]
  let L2 := line[ℝ, E, F]
  let L3 := line[ℝ, O₁, O₂]
  obtain ⟨M, hM1, hM2⟩ : ∃ M, M ∈ L1 ∩ L2 := sorry
  have hM3 : M ∈ L3 := sorry
  exact ⟨M, ⟨hM1, hM2, hM3⟩⟩

have h_concyclic : Concyclic ({B, C, E, F} : Set P) := by
    have hE : E ∈ line[ℝ, A, C] := wbtw_A_E_C.mem_affineSpan
    have hF : F ∈ line[ℝ, A, B] := wbtw_A_F_B.mem_affineSpan
    have h_ang : ∠ B C E = ∠ B F E := sorry
    exact concyclic_of_angle_eq_angle_pts h_ang
  have hE_ne_F : E ≠ F := by
    intro h
    have hA : E = A := sorry
    rw [hA] at angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD
    have hBCD : ∠ B C D = 0 := by rw [← angle_ADE_eq_angle_BCD, angle_self]
    have hDBC : D ∈ line[ℝ, B, C] := sorry
    exact (Triangle.interior_subset_closure D_mem_interior_ABC).not_mem_boundary hDBC
  have hO1_ne_O2 : O₁ ≠ O₂ := by
    intro h
    have hO : O₁ = O₂ := h
    sorry
  let P_int := (line[ℝ, B, C] ∩ line[ℝ, E, F]).choose
  have h_inter : (line[ℝ, B, C] ∩ line[ℝ, E, F] ∩ line[ℝ, O₁, O₂]).Nonempty := by
    use P_int
    have hP : P_int ∈ line[ℝ, B, C] ∧ P_int ∈ line[ℝ, E, F] := sorry
    have hPO : P_int ∈ line[ℝ, O₁, O₂] := sorry
    exact ⟨⟨hP.1, hP.2⟩, hPO⟩
  exact ⟨hE_ne_F, hO1_ne_O2, h_inter⟩
